Atty. CODY KENNEDY, Esq. and Atty. ALAN LAZAR, Esq. of Marlin & Saltzman, LLP (tel: 818-991-8080); Atty. DAVID ROSENBERG, Esq. of Rosenberg, Shpall & Zeigen, APLC (tel: 619-232-1826); Atty. MALTE FARNAES, Esq. of Farnaes & Lucio, APC (tel: 760-942-9430) for Plaintiffs.
Atty. TIM JOHNSON, Esq. of Ogletree, Deakins, Nash, Smoak & Stewart, P.C. (tel: 858-652-3100) for Defendants.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFFS TRICIA YEOMANS INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED, ISMAIL CHRAIBI, ADRIAN RODRIGUEZ, ROBERT JENKINS, AND DOROTHY JENKINS' Unopposed Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement.

Matter discussed as to the discovery exchange between the parties. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court grants preliminary approval of class action and PAGA settlement, and sets a final approval hearing for August 13, 2025, at 9:00 A.M. in Department 301.

Order signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. =(301/CVA)
